programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Baker Mayfield led the Rams to two late fourth-quarter touchdowns and a stunning 17-16 victory over the Las Vegas Raiders, capped by a 23-yard scoring pass to Van Jefferson with 10 seconds left.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Second-year quarterback Drake Maye threw for two touchdowns and rushed for another to help lead the Patriots top their AFC East rival for the first time since 2022 as New England wins 33-27 against the Miami Dolphins.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: From hurdles to jukes to one-handed catches, check out the most athletic plays in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: The Kahuku High School Red Raiders honor the memory of three fallen coaches and their Polynesian heritage by bringing a state championship to Hawaii's North Shore of Oahu.

programme.title: NFL Draft
programme.sub-title: Jordan Mailata's Journey From Australian Rugby League to Eagles Draft Pick
programme.desc: Meet Jordan Mailata, the 6-foot-8, 345-pound former rugby league player from Sydney, Australia. Jordan has left a successful career in Australia to try and achieve the impossible - making an NFL roster, with no knowledge or previous experience.

programme.title: NFL Media Originals
programme.sub-title: Mini Movie: Inside Mac Jones' Rookie Season
programme.desc: New England Patriots quarterback Mac Jones had an impressive rookie season. See the best moments from his 22-TD, 3801-yard year.

programme.title: NFL Events
programme.desc: Former NFL linebacker and Super Bowl champion Scott Fujita traces his family history in the U.S. back to Japanese internment during World War II.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: Three players risk their lives to save others, an NFL hopeful has a transformational experience in Japan, and Joshua Dobbs forms a close bond with a young cancer survivor.

programme.title: NFL Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the best routes from 2025.

programme.title: NFL Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the best special teams plays of 2025.

programme.title: NFL Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the best trick plays of 2025.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jets lose Aaron Rodgers to an Achilles tendon injury, then rally to stun Bills 22-16 in overtime.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: From dominant dynasties to wild underdog stories and Super Bowl thrillers, NFL Throwback takes a deep dive into the 2000s.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: Greatest Game Ever: Broncos vs. Cowboys (2013)
programme.desc: The record-setting Broncos travel to Dallas where Peyton Manning and Tony Romo have a shoot-out for the ages.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: See the best games to ever take place outside of America.

programme.desc: Denver Broncos beat the Jacksonville Jaguars 21-17 in London to snap losing streak.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Denver Broncos beat the Jacksonville Jaguars 21-17 in London to snap losing streak.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes shines with 2 touchdowns as the Chiefs edge the Dolphins 21-14 in Germany. Trent McDuffie's forced fumble and Bryan Cook's ensuing fumble return sealed the win in Frankfurt.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.desc: Debbie Doniger is here to go through the checkpoints of the golf swing -- from the setup to the top of the backswing. She's got individualized tips and drills for each position to help golfers play their best golf and own their swing.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Golf instructor Michael Breed answers viewers' e-mail questions.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: To improve your golf swing.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake is helping you find more fairways in the ultimate quest to hit your driver straight. Devan explains why things like depth and width are crucial to hitting straight drives.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake is here to explain how ground forces work in the golf swing; he has tips, drills, and exercises to help you train all three of the ground forces involved in the swing.

programme.title: The Conor Moore Show
programme.desc: The most popular comedy skits and sketches from three seasons of The Conor Moore Show; from marriage counseling to the best (or worst) swing coach in the world, Conor and friends are guaranteed to provide a laugh.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Hally is haunted by an apparition; Emilia Migliaccio's decision to join golf media rather than turn pro.

programme.title: Breaking Golf's Greatest Myths
programme.desc: Martin Chuck examines a number of swing myths that have persisted over the years like "keep your head down" and "keep your lead arm straight."

programme.title: Breaking Golf's Greatest Myths
programme.desc: Martin Chuck examines a number of swing myths that have persisted over the years like "keep your head down" and "keep your lead arm straight."

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with former Big Break competitors Isaac Sanchez and Chad Pfeifer.Sanchez, who goes by the nickname "Sasquatch," is in actuality a gentle giant. But that didn't stop the competitor in him from creating some mythical moments.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Mallory Blackwelder, Julien Trudeau & Robbie Biershenk
programme.desc: They began as members of opposite teams on Big Break Ireland; Mallory Blackwelder and Julien Trudeau ended as the series' first married couple; in between, Mallory was a standout on Big Break NFL for Team Brown; meet the rest of their new team.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Sara Brown graced Golf Channel screens with strong runs at Big Break Sandals and Big Break Dominican Republic; she is running a family, occasionally herding preschoolers and being the ultimate team mom for her husband’s other successful squad.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Don Donatello & Stefanie Kenoyer; Al Del Greco
programme.desc: Don Donatello earned notoriety for his outbursts and antics, but quickly became heralded as a gritty competitor. Appearances on Big Break IV U.S. vs. Europe and Big Break Reunion solidified Donatello as legendary.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The competitors take a road trip to one of Ireland's premiere links courses where the wind and two players' emotions try to blow the teams apart. Distrust and dislike forces one team to put emotions aside for the betterment of the group.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Competitors fight to remain and keep their hopes alive. Smelling blood, one team looks to eradicate the opposition.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: With the team competition complete, the final four realize that the end is near and the title is now within their reach. A long awaited match between former teammates spells disaster for one, leaving the other fighting for their life.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: You'll Need the Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: The final three are only one step away from locking up a spot in the finale, the only question is who will rise to the occasion?

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The final two contestants battle it out for the title of champion.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal competes in a 2v2 match with Sabrina, Alexis and Marissa from Golf Girl Games.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal teams up with Sabrina Andolpho, founder of the influencer group Golf Girl Games, for competitions with athletes and celebrities.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Learn how to drive the ball farther of the tee with help from David Duval.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: David Duval shares tips to help players control distance with their irons, how to grip club, and gain more consistency through entire bag.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: David Duval and Charlie Rymer share tips and drills that cover all aspects of golf.

programme.title: My Roots: Ernie Els
programme.desc: Follow Ernie's journey from his early years in South Africa, to his climb to world No. 1, his battles with Tiger and the creation of his foundation Els for Autism.

programme.title: My Roots
programme.desc: The life and career of Darren Clarke of Northern Ireland; the path of golf, his life and his career, from Wake Forest University to the European Tour, the PGA Tour and beyond; his experience as a member of the European Ryder Cup team.

programme.title: My Roots: Bernhard Langer
programme.desc: Bernhard Langer shares his own story in open and honest language, giving golf fans an unprecedented look at his life, losses, and love of the game.

programme.title: Golf Central
